title: EnderiteCore
description: This Mod adds Enderite, which is found in the Nether and is better than Netherite.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bfca630c6be3dcee8c40e2b8122e70bbbcb2bbe.png)
This Mod has a bunch, and I might add more than Enderite. EnderiteCore has armor, tools, maybe shields, recipes, and more. These are all the things currently in EnderiteCore. 

Blocks
---------------------------------------
- Enderite Ore
- Block of enderite (WIP)

Tools
---------------------------------------
- Enderite Sword
- Enderite Pickaxe
- Enderite Axe
- Enderite Shovel
- Enderite Hoe

Items
---------------------------------------
- Enderite Ingot
- Enderite Smithing Template (EST)

Recipes
---------------------------------------
- ESTcraft (crafting recipe for EST)
- Sworrd (smithing for Enderite Sword)
- Pickk (smithing for Enderite Pickaxe)
- Axee (smithing for Enderite Axe)
- Shovvel (smithing for Enderite Shovel)
- Hoee (smithing for Enderite Hoe)

Advancements
---------------------------------------
- Enderite! | Collected a piece of Enderite!
- That's Big Dedication | Get a Enderite Hoe.

Armor
---------------------------------------
- Enderite Armor


Made with MCreator!!!
Supported Versions: 1.20.1, more soon
